reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the product-owned scripted live-run workspace boundary claims satisfied; do not infer remote/session or persona-quality behavior.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names live-run workspace allocation and prepare-hook timing, which are deterministic CLI/runtime behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by CLI smoke tests: the product-owned scripted loop creates <output_file>.d/workspace, runs the prepare hook once before turns, and reuses that same workspace for each turn.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the product-owned scripted loop smoke test current when changing live-run workspace allocation or prepare-hook timing.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names the public packet and adapter-template boundary for live-run workspace lifecycle, which should be protected by deterministic CLI tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by CLI smoke tests: workspace_dir flows through adapter command placeholders to the consumer turn command while the public live-run result packet does not expose the workspace directory path.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep the public-packet no-workspace assertion and adapter placeholder tests current when changing live-run invocation packet shape.
